description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.9 Docker image and defines a REPO_NAME variable. Add a global before_script that runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libsdl2{,-mixer,-image,-ttf,-gfx}-dev`, creates the GOPATH src directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project directory, changes into it, executes `go get -u gitlab.com/i-tre-brutti/common/...`, `go get -u github.com/golang/dep/cmd/dep`, and runs `dep ensure`. Define two stages, test and build. In the test stage add a job named test that runs `go test ./...`. In the build stage add a job named build that runs `go build`.
